title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/01/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.3 % today, the main contract closed 835.The traders' willingness to shipis less.The steel mills are wait and see .The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse.PBF at Shandong port deal 838 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 840 yuan/mt. From the macro perspective, the GDP growth rate in 2022 was 3%, lower than the market expectation. However, considering that the market's vision has shifted to 2023, the impact on the market is relatively limited.
